name: Lead Pipeline Conversion & Bottlenecks
description: Analyze the lead conversion funnel from prospect to contract — identify stage-to-stage drop-offs, conversion rates by lead type (seller vs buyer), source effectiveness, archived lead patterns, and time-in-stage bottlenecks

name: Agent Productivity & Effectiveness
description: Compare agent activity patterns (listing views, calls, shares, reminders) against outcomes (transactions, conversion rates) to identify behaviors that drive success and surface underperforming segments

name: Listing Performance & Market Dynamics
description: Analyze listing engagement rates, days on market by property type and price range, price change patterns, valuation accuracy vs transaction prices, and amenity correlations with listing performance

name: Lead Response Speed & Follow-up Discipline
description: Measure time from lead creation to first contact, quantify the impact of response speed on conversion, analyze notification-to-action gaps, and identify follow-up discipline patterns across offices and agents

name: Buyer-Seller Matching & Engagement
description: Analyze listing share effectiveness across channels (WhatsApp, SMS, Telegram), buyer lead criteria matching, share-to-engagement-to-transaction conversion, and buyer demand follow-up patterns

name: Valuation Usage & Pricing Accuracy
description: Analyze valuation adoption rates, valuation score distribution, correlation between valuation usage and deal velocity, pricing accuracy (suggested vs actual transaction price), and valuation report sharing patterns
